mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO attractions (content_id, title, content_type_id, sido_code, gugun_code, first_image1, first_image2, map_level, latitude, longitude, tel, addr1, addr2, modified_time) VALUES
(#{a.contentId}, #{a.title}, #{a.contentTypeId}, #{a.sidoCode}, #{a.gugunCode}, #{a.firstImage1}, #{a.firstImage2}, #{a.mapLevel}, #{a.latitude}, #{a.longitude}, #{a.tel}, #{a.addr1}, #{a.addr2}, #{a.modifiedTime})
ON CONFLICT (content_id) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title, content_type_id = EXCLUDED.content_type_id, sido_code = EXCLUDED.sido_code, gugun_code = EXCLUDED.gugun_code, first_image1 = EXCLUDED.first_image1, first_image2 = EXCLUDED.first_image2, map_level = EXCLUDED.map_level, latitude = EXCLUDED.latitude, longitude = EXCLUDED.longitude, tel = EXCLUDED.tel, addr1 = EXCLUDED.addr1, addr2 = EXCLUDED.addr2, modified_time = EXCLUDED.modified_time
mapper.select:
SELECT a.content_id AS contentId, a.title AS title, s.sido_name AS sidoName, g.gugun_name AS gugunName, a.content_type_id AS contentTypeId, a.first_image1 AS firstImage1 FROM attractions a LEFT JOIN sidos s ON a.sido_code = s.sido_code LEFT JOIN guguns g ON a.sido_code = g.sido_code AND a.gugun_code = g.gugun_code
ORDER BY a.no LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT a.content_id AS contentId, a.title AS title, a.content_type_id AS contentTypeId, ct.content_type_name AS contentTypeName, a.sido_code AS sidoCode, s.sido_name AS sidoName, a.gugun_code AS gugunCode, g.gugun_name AS gugunName, a.first_image1 AS firstImage1, a.first_image2 AS firstImage2, a.map_level AS mapLevel, a.latitude AS latitude, a.longitude AS longitude, a.tel AS tel, a.addr1 AS addr1, a.addr2 AS addr2, a.homepage AS homepage, a.overview AS overview, a.rest_date AS restDate, a.modified_time AS modifiedTime FROM attractions a LEFT JOIN sidos s ON a.sido_code = s.sido_code LEFT JOIN guguns g ON a.sido_code = g.sido_code AND a.gugun_code = g.gugun_code LEFT JOIN contenttypes ct ON a.content_type_id = ct.content_type_id WHERE a.content_id = #{contentId}
